name: Desktop Automation Playbook
description: Current operating guide for Prometheus desktop automation on Windows. Covers screenshot-first execution, window targeting, UI Automation availability fallbacks, precise clicking, scrolling, typing, app launch/recovery, verification, foreground/background limits, macros when available, and when to use desktop tools versus browser or shell tools.

permissions.notes: Foreground desktop tools move/focus/click/type on the user's real Windows desktop unless a background worker is configured. Avoid destructive app actions unless explicitly requested.

resources.description: Real 2026-05-24 Windows desktop stress-test findings, recovery paths, and safe future recipe.
